title: Стаття 2 ( 19.07.09) OK
author: Bezverkhniy Volodymyr Dmytrovych
description: It is easy to show, that relation multiplicity = f(L) and Е = f(L), where multiplicity is multiplicity of bond, L – length of bond in Å, Е – energy of bond in kj/mole will be described by function y = a + b/x + c/x² for any types of bond (C-C, C-N, C-O, C-S, N-N, N-O, O-O, C-P).
